original: A chemically-treated shard of crystallized goo from a ganrael. When shattered, the shard will cover the user with goo that will rapidly recrystallize, granting a defensive boost for several hours.
Any more crystals and you’d be lucky to move, let alone fight.
{var0}+{var1}+" considers it unwise to use another crystal on "+{var2}.mfn("him","her","it")+"self.

original: You hold the crystal aloft and break it apart, coating yourself with a splash of liquid goo. It clings to your body, rapidly recrystallizing into glittering, rock-hard plates!

{var0}+{var1}+" breaks open a crystal shard, soaking "+{var2}.mfn("him","her","it")+"self in a greenish goo that rapidly hardens into crystal! You’ll have a hard time hurting "+{var3}.mfn("him","her","it")+"!
